name: ChatBox

slots.name: root
slots.description: The outermost container element. Defaults to `div`.

slots.name: layout
slots.description: The layout element that arranges conversations + thread panes. Defaults to `div`.

slots.name: conversationsPane
slots.description: The conversations pane container. Defaults to `div`.

slots.name: threadPane
slots.description: The thread pane container. Defaults to `div`.

slots.name: conversationList
slots.description: Override the conversation list component.

slots.name: conversationHeader
slots.description: Override the conversation header component.

slots.name: conversationTitle
slots.description: Override the conversation title component.

slots.name: conversationSubtitle
slots.description: Override the conversation subtitle component.

slots.name: conversationHeaderInfo
slots.description: Override the conversation header info wrapper (title + subtitle column).

slots.name: conversationHeaderActions
slots.description: Override the conversation header actions component.

slots.name: messageList
slots.description: Override the message list component.

slots.name: group
slots.description: Override the message group component.

slots.name: message
slots.description: Override the message root component for each message.

slots.name: avatar
slots.description:
Override the message avatar component.
Pass `null` to hide the avatar entirely and drop the reserved avatar grid track.

slots.name: content
slots.description: Override the message content (bubble) component.

slots.name: meta
slots.description:
Override the message meta component (compact variant external meta).
Pass `null` to hide it.

slots.name: actions
slots.description:
Override the message actions component.
Pass `null` to hide actions entirely.

slots.name: dateDivider
slots.description: Override the date divider component.

slots.name: composer
slots.description: Override the composer (input) root component.

slots.name: input
slots.description: Override the composer textarea component.

slots.name: send
slots.description:
Override the composer send button.
Pass `null` to hide the send button (form still submits on Enter).

slots.name: attach
slots.description:
Override the composer attach button.
Pass `null` to hide just the attach button while keeping the rest of the attachment plumbing.
Use `features.attachments: false` to disable attachments entirely.

slots.name: attachmentList
slots.description: Override the composer attachment list.

slots.name: toolbar
slots.description: Override the composer toolbar.

slots.name: helperText
slots.description: Override the composer helper text component.

slots.name: typingIndicator
slots.description: Override the typing indicator component.

slots.name: unreadMarker
slots.description: Override the unread marker component.

slots.name: scrollToBottom
slots.description: Override the scroll-to-bottom affordance component.

slots.name: suggestions
slots.description: Override the prompt suggestions container component.

slots.name: emptyState
slots.description:
Override the UI rendered in the center of the thread when the active conversation has no messages.
When provided, `suggestions` (if any) move from the center position to a row above the composer.
